## Testing Standards

- Use the project's declared test approach. If none is declared, mark it as NEEDS CLARIFICATION.

## Quality Gates

- Only require the quality gates explicitly declared by this project before merge.

## Performance Benchmarks

- CLI operations should complete quickly (typically under 2 seconds).

## Branch Strategy

- At least one focused reviewer approves before merge.
- Deployment constraints: Must run on macOS and Linux developer environments.

## Policy Summary

- Intent: Deliver predictable changes with clear reviewability.
- Languages/Frameworks: Use only the languages, frameworks, and tools explicitly declared by this project.
- Testing: Use the project's declared test approach. If none is declared, mark it as NEEDS CLARIFICATION.
- Quality Gates: Only require the quality gates explicitly declared by this project before merge.
- Review Policy: At least one focused reviewer approves before merge.
- Performance Targets: CLI operations should complete quickly (typically under 2 seconds).
- Deployment Constraints: Must run on macOS and Linux developer environments.

## Project Directives

1. Keep specification, plan, tasks, implementation, and review artifacts consistent.

## Amendment Process

Amendments are proposed by PR and reviewed before adoption.

## Exception Policy

Exceptions must include rationale and expiration criteria.
